research_question: In randomized controlled trials reporting statistically significant outcomes in spine surgery (P), what is the proportion of these outcomes that are fragile, as determined by a fragility index analysis (I), compared to a threshold of clinical robustness (C), to assess the reliability of reported statistical findings (O)?
